description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a gently sloping shoulder and a long neck, reminiscent of a champagne or sparkling wine bottle. The main body is a muted green color, and it features a dark band around the upper portion, likely representing a foil or label. The front displays a circular gold emblem and some text, suggesting branding or product information, while the back and sides are plain. The neck is capped with a dark closure, possibly a cork or foil-wrapped cork, typical for sparkling beverages. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible damage or deformation.
description: A tall, green glass bottle with a long neck, dark band, and gold emblem on the front, resembling a champagne or sparkling wine bottle. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold emblem, text, and dark band around the neck.
description_view_1: Rear view with no visible labels or emblems, showing the plain green body and dark neck.
description_view_2: Side view with the dark band and plain green body, no visible branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 2, with a plain green body and dark neck.
attribute_label_or_branding: Gold circular emblem and text on the front, with a dark band around the neck; no other visible branding.
